verdicts.issue: Missing pages (4895--4901), publisher (Association for Computational Linguistics), and DOI (10.18653/v1/2023.emnlp-main.298) for an EMNLP 2023 conference paper. Per bib-check rule §3 conferences require publisher; per §4 EMNLP paper has page numbers and they must be included. Entry type @article is also incorrect; should be @inproceedings since this was published at EMNLP 2023, not just an arXiv preprint.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of the 2023 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)

verdicts.issue: Missing url field for ICLR oral with no DOI. Per bib-check §4, every entry must include a DOI or working URL as canonical locator. Recommend adding url to the OpenReview forum entry. Otherwise content is correct (verified at ICLR 2024 oral).

Author list and key first-author both wrong. Actual first author is Chao Zhang (not Chao Shang); full author list per the published paper and DBLP is Chao Zhang, Fangbo Tao, Xiusi Chen, Jiaming Shen, Meng Jiang, Brian M. Sadler, Michelle Vanni, Jiawei Han. The current entry has fabricated authors (Shang, Liu, Cheng, Peng, Ren, Han). The key prefix "shang" therefore violates bib-check §5 (key surname must match first author). Renaming requires updating every [@shang2018taxogen] reference in associated source files (.qmd, .tex, etc).

suggested_fix.author: Zhang, Chao and Tao, Fangbo and Chen, Xiusi and Shen, Jiaming and Jiang, Meng and Sadler, Brian M. and Vanni, Michelle and Han, Jiawei

verdicts.issue: Publisher field reads "National Institute for Science Education, University of Wisconsin–Madison" but the canonical publisher of this monograph is the Council of Chief State School Officers (CCSSO). NISE was a co-developer of the criteria but CCSSO is the publishing body per ERIC ED414305. Also the journal field is incorrectly used for a research monograph; entry type should be @techreport with institution = CCSSO, number = "Research Monograph No. 6".

suggested_fix.publisher: Council of Chief State School Officers
suggested_fix.institution: Council of Chief State School Officers

verdicts.issue: Booktitle reads "Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 36: Datasets and Benchmarks Track". Per bib-check §2 venue should explicitly include the (NeurIPS) acronym tag. Publisher "Neural Information Processing Systems Foundation" should be "Curran Associates" per §3 publisher rule for NeurIPS. Content (authors/year/title) is correct; flagged as uncertain because these are formatting/style fixes, not substance errors.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 36 (NeurIPS): Datasets and Benchmarks Track
